rulings.Case Title: CHARISSA VILLANUEVA VS. CHICO'S FAS.,INC, A FLORIDA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Cation Settlement; Compendium Of Federal Authorities In Support Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED.CLASS COUNSEL TO DISCUSS FAIR MARKET VALUE OF GIFT CARDS AND WHAT IS CASH EQUIVALENT VALUE OF SUCH CARDS.ATTORNEUS FEES AND COSTS IN LCASS SETTLEMENTS SHOULD NORMALLY BE LESS THAN 30% OF CASH VALUE OF ENTIRE SETTLEMENT. (302/AJR/BL-EX)

rulings.Case Title: MELISSA NEWMAN et al VS. KIMPTON HOTEL & RESTAURANT GROUP, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Conditionally Certifying A Settlement; Prelim Approving Class Action Settlement; Approving Ntc Of Class Action Settlement; Scheduling Order
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED.CLASS COUNSEL SHOULD BE PREPARED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH AN ESTIMATE OF THE HOURS THEY SPENT AND THEIR HOURLY RATE IN TOTAL.ALSO, SHOULD BE PREPARED TO TELL COURT APPROXIMATELY HOW MUCH TIME SPENT IN DIFFERENT PHASES OF LITIGATION e.g.PLEADINGS, ETC. (302AJR/BL-EX)

rulings.Rulings: GRANT-NO COMPEL ARBITRATION ACTION STAYED. NO GROUND OF FEDERAL PRE-EMTION ESTABLISHED. COURT SEVERE REQUEST FOR INJUCTIVE RELIEF FROM ARBITRATION (SEE GROMM V. HEALTH NET 2000 82CALAPP 4TH 1189, 1199.(302/AJR/PB)
